title: E-commerce API
description: A fully functional REST API for an online store, enabling users to browse products, manage carts, place orders, and communicate with sellers.

title: Food Delivery Service API
description: A RESTful API for a food delivery platform, supporting customer orders, delivery tracking, rider management, and in-app messaging between users and restaurants.

title: E-commerce App
description: A fully functioning Ecommerce App with its own server. Made with VueJS, NodeJS and ExpressJS

title: Nordic Furnishing
description: A static web page for furniture shop. Made with HTML, CSS and Bootstrap.

title: TechHub
description: A static webpage for Education Hub. Made with HTML, CSS and Bootstrap.
